# Nick Rae

> Commercial pilot, iOS developer, and AI builder based in Merced, CA. Building side income through apps, prediction markets, and automation to fund flight hours toward an airline career.

## About

Nick Rae is a Commercial Instrument Multi-Engine rated pilot with 369+ flight hours, working toward 1,500 hours for ATP certification. He builds iOS apps, runs an AI-powered weather prediction trading bot, and publishes aviation study materials on Amazon KDP. He documents the journey at nickrae.net.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://nickrae.net/)

- [FeedFare App](https://nickrae.net/feedfare/)
- [Inflection Point App](https://nickrae.net/inflection/)
